description: Log in to ManageEngine OpManager at http://localhost:8060 using credentials admin / Admin@123. Navigate to Settings > Discovery > Device Templates. Your goal is to establish a strict, lightweight performance polling baseline to conserve system resources. Find and edit the generic 'Windows' device template. Go to its Monitors (Performance Monitors) tab and delete all monitors EXCEPT 'CPU Utilization' and 'Memory Utilization'. Save the template. Then, repeat the exact same process for the generic 'Linux' device template (delete all performance monitors EXCEPT 'CPU Utilization' and 'Memory Utilization' and save). Do not modify other tabs like Event Logs, Services, or Processes.
